      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hm

  have h3 : denum Int := denum_int
  define at h3
  obtain ⟨h, bijh⟩ := h3
  exact ⟨g ∘ h, one_one_onto_comp bijh bij_g⟩

      rw [this, hm]

  exact denum_of_equiv_denum h denum_int

by
  define
  set f : Nat → Int := fun n => if n % 2 = 0 then ↑(n / 2) * 2 else -(↑(n / 2) + 1) * 2
  apply Exists.intro f
  constructor
  · -- one-to-one
    define
    intro n1 n2 h
    simp only at h
    by_cases h1 : n1 % 2 = 0 <;> by_cases h2 : n2 % 2 = 0
    · simp only [h1, h2, if_true] at h
      have : (n1 / 2 : Int) = (n2 / 2 : Int) := by linarith
      have hn1 : n1 = 2 * (n1 / 2) := by omega
      have hn2 : n2 = 2 * (n2 / 2) := by omega
      omega
    · simp only [h1, h2, if_true, if_false] at h
      have : (↑(n1 / 2) : Int) * 2 = -(↑(n2 / 2) + 1) * 2 := h
      have : (↑(n1 / 2) : Int) = -(↑(n2 / 2) + 1) := by linarith
      omega
    · simp only [h1, h2, if_true, if_false] at h
      have : -(↑(n1 / 2) + 1 : Int) * 2 = (↑(n2 / 2)) * 2 := h
      have : -(↑(n1 / 2) + 1 : Int) = (↑(n2 / 2)) := by linarith
      omega
    · simp only [h1, h2, if_false] at h
      have : -(↑(n1 / 2) + 1 : Int) * 2 = -(↑(n2 / 2) + 1) * 2 := h
      have : (↑(n1 / 2) : Int) = (↑(n2 / 2) : Int) := by linarith
      have hn1 : n1 = 2 * (n1 / 2) + 1 := by omega
      have hn2 : n2 = 2 * (n2 / 2) + 1 := by omega
      omega
  · -- onto
    define
    intro y ⟨hy⟩
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hy
    by_cases hk_neg : k < 0
    · use 2 * (-k).toNat - 1
      constructor
      · have : -k ≥ 1 := by omega
        have : (-k).toNat ≥ 1 := by exact Int.toNat_of_nonneg this ▸ le_refl _; omega
        omega
      · simp only
        have h1 : (2 * (-k).toNat - 1) % 2 = 1 := by omega
        simp only [h1, if_false]
        have h2 : (2 * (-k).toNat - 1) / 2 = (-k).toNat - 1 := by omega
        rw [h2]
        have hkneg : (-k).toNat = -k := Int.toNat_of_nonneg (by omega)
        simp only [hkneg]
        push_cast
        omega
    · use 2 * k.toNat
      constructor
      · omega
      · simp only
        have h1 : (2 * k.toNat) % 2 = 0 := by omega
        simp only [h1, if_true]
        have h2 : (2 * k.toNat) / 2 = k.toNat := by omega
        rw [h2]
        have hkpos : k.toNat = k := Int.toNat_of_nonneg (by omega)
        simp only [hkpos]
        omega
